mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.manager_id, m.name AS manager_name, COUNT(e.member_id) AS emp_count, d.created_at FROM department d LEFT JOIN member m ON d.manager_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN member e ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.manager_id, m.name, d.created_at ORDER BY d.dept_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (dept_id, dept_name, manager_id) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{managerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
